mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is already near the effective lower bound and CPIAUCSL remains elevated, markets infer persistent inflation pressure and a delayed policy response, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield upward over the next 20 trading days as term premia reprice higher.
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL cools for two consecutive monthly prints while FEDFUNDS rises, and the 10-year yield falls over the subsequent 20 trading days in more than 60% of such episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals weakening labor demand and slower nominal growth, which lowers inflation expectations and pulls the 10-year Treasury yield down within 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points versus the prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if threshold crossings of UNRATE do not precede a negative 20-day yield move at least 55% of the time, or if the median 20-day yield change is positive after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous acceleration in RSAFS and HOUST indicates broad demand strength and a firmer growth outlook, which lifts inflation compensation and raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive change in RSAFS and HOUST is followed by a lower 10-year yield in more than 60% of cases, or if either series alone explains the signal better than the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while CPIAUCSL remains stable, markets read the data as supply-side normalization that eases inflation pressure, which depresses the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases month over month while CPIAUCSL is flat or lower over the latest monthly observation
failure_condition: Reject if months with rising INDPRO and non-accelerating CPIAUCSL do not coincide with a lower 10-year yield in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in FEDFUNDS above neutral signals active tightening, which raises short-rate expectations and lifts the 10-year Treasury yield as the term structure reprices over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 50 bps from the prior monthly print
failure_condition: Reject if post-hike 5-day yield changes are non-positive in more than 60% of tightening events or if the average 5-day change is not above zero.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in PAYEMS together with a rising UNRATE identifies a labor-market deterioration regime, which lowers growth expectations and drives the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS decline and UNRATE rise fails to precede negative 20-day yield moves in at least 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle demand slowdown, weakening GDPC1 and RSAFS together signal broad nominal activity deceleration, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next quarter as investors price slower future inflation and policy easing.
failure_condition: Reject if joint negative growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS does not coincide with lower 60-day yield changes in a majority of historical instances, or if the effect disappears outside slowdown regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production weakens while housing starts also fall, the combination indicates broad supply and activity loss that depresses expected real growth and lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by at least 5% month over month and INDPRO is below its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint weakness in INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict lower 20-day yields in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if either variable alone produces the same effect.
